aqa.displayName: Model that performs Attributed Question Answering.
aqa.description: Model trained to return answers to questions that are grounded in provided sources, along with estimating answerable probability.
aqa.note: Pricing is based on a per-query rate for the generateAnswer method in the Pay-as-you-go tier. It is free in the Free tier with rate limits.

deep-research-pro-preview-12-2025.description: Preview release (December 12th, 2025) of Deep Research Pro
deep-research-pro-preview-12-2025.note: Pricing follows a pay-as-you-go model based on the underlying Gemini 3.1 Pro model and the specific tools the agent utilizes.
restrictions: Exclusively available using the Interactions API
Does not support human-approved planning or structured outputs
Thinking probes did not verify level or budget support.
Free tier data used for product improvement

gemini-2.0-flash-001.description: Stable version of Gemini 2.0 Flash, our fast and versatile multimodal model for scaling across diverse tasks, released in January of 2025.

gemini-2.0-flash-lite.note: Paid tier pricing per 1 million tokens; simplified flat pricing with no context threshold.

gemini-2.0-flash-lite-001.note: Single price per input type; no tiered pricing. Scheduled for shutdown on June 1, 2026.

gemini-2.5-computer-use-preview-10-2025.note: Optimized for building browser control agents. Gemini 3 Pro and Flash models support built-in computer use without a separate model.
restrictions: Do not use for tasks involving critical decisions, sensitive data, or actions where serious errors cannot be corrected
Run in a secure and controlled environment (e.g., sandboxed VM or container)
Thinking mode (Dynamic budget only); set include_thoughts to true in thinking config
Thinking probes did not verify level or budget support.

gemini-2.5-flash.description: Stable version of Gemini 2.5 Flash, our mid-size multimodal model that supports up to 1 million tokens, released in June of 2025.
restrictions: Use thinkingBudget parameter to guide the model on the specific number of thinking tokens to use for reasoning. Setting thinkingBudget to -1 turns on dynamic thinking.

thinkingPresets.label: Off
thinkingPresets.description: Disable thinking with budget 0.

thinkingPresets.label: Budget 1024
thinkingPresets.description: Verified thinking budget 1024.

thinkingPresets.label: Budget 8192
thinkingPresets.description: Verified thinking budget 8192.

thinkingPresets.label: Dynamic
thinkingPresets.description: Use the model default dynamic thinking budget.

gemini-2.5-flash-image.note: Image output is billed at $30.00 per 1M tokens (~$0.039/image). Text modalities follow standard Gemini 2.5 Flash pricing.
restrictions: SynthID digital watermarking included in all images

gemini-2.5-flash-lite.description: Stable version of Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite, released in July of 2025
gemini-2.5-flash-lite.note: Flat pricing for all context lengths. Audio input is priced at $0.30 per 1M tokens.
restrictions: Thinking is disabled by default (thinking_budget: 0). Supported budget range is 512 to 24576 tokens.

thinkingPresets.label: Off
thinkingPresets.description: Disable thinking with budget 0.

thinkingPresets.label: Budget 1024
thinkingPresets.description: Verified thinking budget 1024.

thinkingPresets.label: Budget 8192
thinkingPresets.description: Verified thinking budget 8192.

thinkingPresets.label: Dynamic
thinkingPresets.description: Use the model default dynamic thinking budget.

gemini-2.5-flash-lite-preview-09-2025.note: Pricing for prompts over 200k tokens is double the base rate. Thinking tokens are billed at the same rate as output tokens.
restrictions: Preview models may change before becoming stable and have more restrictive rate limits.

thinkingPresets.label: Off
thinkingPresets.description: Disable thinking with budget 0.

thinkingPresets.label: Budget 1024
thinkingPresets.description: Verified thinking budget 1024.

thinkingPresets.label: Budget 8192
thinkingPresets.description: Verified thinking budget 8192.

thinkingPresets.description: Use the model default dynamic thinking budget.

gemini-2.5-flash-native-audio-latest.description: Stable alias for the most recent version of the native audio model (currently 12-2025).
gemini-2.5-flash-native-audio-latest.note: Optimized for real-time conversational agents with sub-second native audio streaming. Long-context rates (1.5x) apply for prompts > 200k tokens. Thinking tokens are billed at the same rate as output tokens.
restrictions: Preview model with restrictive rate limits
Thinking support could not be probed automatically because this model does not expose generateContent.

gemini-2.5-flash-native-audio-preview-09.note: Input price is $0.50 (text) and $3.00 (audio/video) per 1M tokens. Audio output is $12.00 per 1M tokens for prompts <= 200k and $18.00 for prompts > 200k.
restrictions: Audio input does not trigger history recall in Live API
Thinking support could not be probed automatically because this model does not expose generateContent.

gemini-2.5-flash-native-audio-preview-12.description: Specialized for the Gemini Live API. Processes audio natively (end-to-end) to reduce latency and capture emotional nuance. Improved over the 09-2025 version with better cut-off detection.
gemini-2.5-flash-native-audio-preview-12.note: Preview model for the Live API. Optimized for higher quality audio outputs with better pacing and naturalness. Input price for audio/video is $3.00 per 1M tokens.
restrictions: Grounding with Google Maps not supported
Thinking support could not be probed automatically because this model does not expose generateContent.

gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts.note: Preview model optimized for price-performant, low-latency, controllable speech generation. Pricing is based on tokens rather than characters or seconds.
restrictions: No support for search grounding, function calling, or code execution
Thinking cannot be disabled on this model.

gemini-2.5-pro-preview-tts.description: A Text-to-Speech optimized variant of Gemini 2.5 Pro. Focuses on high-fidelity, expressive human voice generation for long-form content.

gemini-3-flash-preview.note: Pricing is per 1 million tokens. The thinking_level parameter replaces thinking_budget for Gemini 3 models.
restrictions: Preview models may change before becoming stable and have more restrictive rate limits.
Thought signatures are required for multi-turn conversations to maintain reasoning context.
Grounding with Google Maps is not supported.

gemini-3-pro-image-preview.note: Thought signatures are required for conversational editing to maintain reasoning context. Text pricing matches Gemini 3 Pro. Image input is set at 560 tokens per image.
restrictions: Controls the maximum depth of internal reasoning via the thinking_level parameter; defaults to 'high' if not specified.

restrictions: Preview models may change before becoming stable and have more restrictive rate limits.
Not designed around prioritizing supporting audio understanding or image segmentation use cases.
PDF token counts will be listed under the IMAGE modality instead of the DOCUMENT modality.
Use the thinking_level parameter to control the amount of internal reasoning the model performs (low or high) to balance response quality, reasoning complexity, latency, and cost.
Thinking cannot be fully minimized on this model.

gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview.note: Pricing is per 1 million tokens for text. Image pricing varies by resolution: 0.5K ($0.045), 1K ($0.067), 2K ($0.101), and 4K ($0.151).
restrictions: Grounding with Google Maps: Not supported

gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview.note: Most cost-efficient model optimized for high-volume agentic tasks; pricing for grounding starts after 5,000 free monthly queries.
restrictions: Preview models may change before becoming stable and have more restrictive rate limits.

gemini-3.1-pro-preview.description: The latest flagship model (released Feb 19, 2026). Optimized for "agentic reasoning," complex problem solving, and generating animated SVGs directly. Features a 1M token context window.
gemini-3.1-pro-preview.note: Pricing is identical to Gemini 3 Pro Preview. Thinking tokens are included in output price. Supports 1M input context and 64k output tokens. thinking_level defaults to high.
restrictions: Grounding with Google Maps not supported
Thinking cannot be fully minimized on this model.

gemini-3.1-pro-preview-customtools.description: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview optimized for custom tool usage
gemini-3.1-pro-preview-customtools.note: Optimized for agentic workflows that use custom tools and bash; may see quality fluctuations in use cases which don't benefit from such tools.
restrictions: Thinking cannot be fully minimized on this model.

gemini-embedding-001.description: Obtain a distributed representation of a text.
gemini-embedding-001.note: Uses Matryoshka Representation Learning (MRL) for flexible output dimensions (default 3072, can be truncated to 768 or 1536). Supports over 100 languages. Scheduled for shutdown on July 14, 2026.
restrictions: Maximum input token length of 2,048 per input text
Maximum of 250 input texts per request

gemini-flash-latest.note: Alias currently pointing to gemini-3-flash-preview. Flat pricing applies regardless of context length.

gemini-pro-latest.note: Alias currently points to gemini-3-pro-preview; will switch to gemini-3.1-pro-preview on March 6, 2026. gemini-3-pro-preview shuts down March 9, 2026.
restrictions: Fine-tuning isn't supported when thinking is enabled.

gemini-robotics-er-1.5-preview.description: A specialized vision-language model for "Embodied Reasoning." Capable of spatial grounding (2D/3D coordinates) and planning robotic actions.

gemma-3-12b-it.note: Free of charge in Google AI Studio.

gemma-3-1b-it.note: Gemma 3 1B is a text-only model with a 32k context window. It is available for free in Google AI Studio.

gemma-3-27b-it.note: Multimodal model supporting text and image input with text output. Features a 128K token context window.

gemma-3-4b-it.note: Gemma 3 models are available for free in Google AI Studio within rate limits. Pricing for paid tiers or Vertex AI deployments may vary by provider.
restrictions: Google Generative AI Prohibited Use Policy

gemma-3n-e2b-it.note: Free of charge in Google AI Studio.

gemma-3n-e4b-it.note: Gemma 3n models are available in the Gemini API Free Tier; paid tier pricing for this specific model ID is not explicitly detailed on the official pricing page as of March 2026.
restrictions: Google Generative AI Additional Terms of Service
Limit text in images to 25 characters or less
Avoid exceeding three phrases for text in images

imagen-4.0-generate-001.note: Pricing is $0.04 per image for the Standard variant.
restrictions: All generated images include a SynthID watermark
Text rendering in images limited to 25 characters or less

imagen-4.0-ultra-generate-001.note: Available in paid preview in the Gemini API.

nano-banana-pro-preview.note: 4K outputs charged at 2x standard rate. Thinking process generates up to two interim images.
restrictions: The model generates up to two interim images to test composition and logic.

veo-2.0-generate-001.description: Vertex served Veo 2 model. Access to this model requires billing to be enabled on the associated Google Cloud Platform account. Please visit https://console.cloud.google.com/billing to enable it.
veo-2.0-generate-001.note: Pricing is per second of generated video. Supports prompt enhancement and person generation controls.

veo-3.0-fast-generate-001.note: Pricing is $0.15 per second for video with audio (default) and $0.10 per second for video only.

veo-3.0-generate-001.note: Pricing is per second of video. Image-to-video is in preview.

veo-3.1-fast-generate-preview.note: Pricing includes natively generated audio. Available on the paid tier of the Gemini API.

veo-3.1-generate-preview.note: Pricing is $0.40/sec for 720p and 1080p, and $0.60/sec for 4k. Audio generation is included in the per-second rate. Users are only charged for successfully generated videos.
restrictions: Video lengths: 4, 6, or 8 seconds (reference image-to-video only supports 8 seconds)
Image-to-video maximum input image size: 20 MB

gemini-3.1-flash-lite.description: Released March 3, 2026. The most cost-efficient model in the 3.1 family, designed for high-volume, low-latency tasks like real-time translation and content moderation.

gemini-3-deep-think.description: Specialized reasoning model for scientific research, engineering, and autonomous planning. Uses extensive internal "thought" tokens before responding.
